chief_complaint: A 70-year-old woman presented with supraventricular tachycardia.
history: The patient was admitted for treatment of supraventricular tachycardia. Ventriculoatrial conduction was revealed through programmed ventricular stimulation.
exam: No specific physical examination findings were reported.
labs: Programmed ventricular stimulation revealed ventriculoatrial conduction; the coronary sinus ostium was the earliest atrial activation site. The fast-slow forms of atrioventricular nodal reentrant tachycardia were induced by ventricular extra-stimuli.
